STRICTLY PRIVATE & CONFIDENTIAL — Project Banyan — Embargoed until 31 July 2026, 18:00 HKT; contains inside information under Part XIVA of the SFO.
Parties: Orchid Harbour Holdings Limited (incorporated in Hong Kong) as Buyer; Luminous Wharf Group Limited (a Main Board issuer listed on HKEX) as Target.
Structure: Strategic subscription for 22.5% of enlarged share capital via new share issuance and 2.5% secondary purchase from Coral Reef Ventures SPC (together, the “Transaction”).
Consideration: Total HK$480,000,000 (HK$3.20 per new share), funded by Jade Lantern Master Fund — Sub‑Fund “Pearl Crane”; no leverage at Buyer level at signing.
Use of proceeds: capex for Kowloon cold‑chain expansion and working capital; non‑public budget referenced in Board Memo dated 28 June 2026 (Appendix A).
Definitive agreements: Share Subscription Agreement and Shareholders’ Agreement targeted for execution on or before 15 August 2026; long‑stop date 30 September 2026.
Conditions precedent: SFC whitewash waiver (if triggered) under the Takeovers Code, independent shareholders’ approval under HKEX Listing Rules, HKEX clearance, and no Material Adverse Change in the Target Group prior to completion.
MAC carve‑outs: changes in Hong Kong interest rates, typhoon‑related operational disruptions, or HKFRS amendments shall not, in themselves, constitute a MAE; for the avoidance of doubt, there has not been any MAE since 1 January 2026.
Governance and employment: Buyer to nominate 2 of 9 board seats; reserved matters list attached; key management retention — Mr. Pang Hoi‑kit to remain CEO for 36 months at HK$2,400,000 per annum plus options equal to 1.0% of post‑money share capital (vesting over 4 years).
Public reference: As disclosed in the Target’s FY2025 annual report on HKExnews, net cash was approximately HK$120,000,000; this term sheet supplements, and is not inconsistent with, public information.
Announcements & IR: Draft Rule 13.09/Part XIVA announcement and shareholder circular to be prepared by IR and legal; no release prior to the embargo date/time; no analyst briefings until the clean team approves the sanitised materials.
Exclusivity & confidentiality: 60‑day exclusivity; this document contains MNPI and is not for distribution; non‑binding save for confidentiality, exclusivity, costs, and governing law (Hong Kong).
Closing mechanics: Expected completion in late Q3 2026 subject to regulatory clearances; escrow for subscription proceeds to be administered by Starlark Nominees (HK) Limited under Hong Kong law.

Contacts: Ms. Cheung Mei‑lin (Orchid Harbour Holdings) — ms.cheung@orchidharbour.example; Project mailbox — banyan@orchidharbour.example.
